title: Phase 4 second validation Task Cell
objective: Validate that a second small supervised local Task Cell can be defined with the same guardrails and traceability.
context: This second cell checks repeatability with a different documentation-oriented scope from the first phase 4 task.
constraints: Do not call external agents automatically.
Do not distribute work across machines.
acceptance_criteria: The task is different from the first phase 4 task.
The scope is small and reversible.
The same phase 4 guardrails still apply.
implementer_prompt: Prepare a second small phase 4 validation task that stays local, supervised, and easy to roll back.
reviewer_prompt: Review the second validation task for repeatability, safety, and alignment with the phase 4 boundary.
